experiment: nsk1 G2d pre-freeze headroom gate (host-scale probe A' at SmolLM2-1.7B-Instruct zero-shot + few-shot rider A'' at 135M/360M-Instruct; ladder-exhaustion fork ranks 1+2)
candidate: nsk1 flagship line (neurosym-kernel-internals): does any (form, host, shot) cell open measurable headroom for the internal-vs-external grounding contrast after the g2/g2b/g2c ladder exhausted?
_placement_note: kot-assess/1 record at registry/assessments/<id>.json alongside g-series and f2b-replicate. IMPORTANT SCOPE: nsk1 has NO frozen SAP, NO results-log, NO verdict object - G2d is a pre-freeze gate run, every row phase:exploratory (quarantined, uncitable, flips no verdict). This assessment interprets GATE data under the section 5.2/5.2.1 licence (exploratory rows may decide pre-freeze gates and ground feasibility findings at MEASURED-exploratory grade, the ladder-exhaustion doc's proposed-ASM-B convention) - it creates no verdict and changes no frozen object. Evidentiary grade throughout: MEASURED-exploratory, strictly below verdict grade.
assessor_binding: FABLE interpretive assessment per the kern Fable/Opus execution split: the runner (Opus, experiment-runner role) executed G2d on Modal and reported mechanical facts only; what the numbers MEAN - the delivery-channel finding, the status of the single passing cell, the re-freeze question, and the B-prime fork consequence - is decided here and only here. Role file .claude/agents/experiment-designer.md; this record interprets, it does not run, grade, or audit. The runner's few-shot exemplar construction (flagged in the harness for designer confirmation) is CONFIRMED below. Companion deliverable produced with this assessment: docs/next/nsk1-bprime-stage0-spec.md (the runner-ready B-prime spec) + ASM-0040..0043.

g2d.results_log: none (pre-freeze gate; outputs under poc/nsk1/out/g2d/, phase:exploratory)

g2d.gate_rule: (form,host,shot) PASS iff acc(text-only) in [0.05,0.85] AND acc(external) >= acc(text-only)+0.02 - the section 5.2 two-clause rule reused verbatim

harness.note: g2d entrypoint appended; g2/g2b/g2c content and shared helpers byte-untouched per the runner; target prompts byte-reused from _build_specs_g2b/_build_specs_g2c

measurement_refs.prior_ladder: poc/nsk1/out/{g2,g2b,g2c}/ sha256s as pinned in docs/next/nsk1-ladder-exhaustion.md header
measurement_refs.scope_note: Every number in this assessment: n=100 per cell per arm, greedy, fp32, chat template, max_new_tokens=16, phase:exploratory, the pinned Instruct checkpoints, this one discarded 100-item CLUTRR headroom slice + the first-100 custom covered split. Citing any of them wider re-classifies the citation as EXTRAPOLATION.

_surprise_note: No registered prior exists for the G2d cells (gate data, no claim.md). Informally: the 1.7B text-only entity accuracy (0.76) landing in-window was the fork's hoped-for outcome (proposed-ASM-C direction), but the external arm HARMING a fully capable host by 33pp with ZERO rescued items (see recount) is a sharper negative than any prior discussion anticipated - the ladder docs had left open that the damage was mostly a tiny-host format-collapse artifact.

interpretation.headline: G2d establishes the programme's first DELIVERY-CHANNEL separation: composition capability and text-delivered grounding harm now coexist in the same cell. At 1.7B zero-shot on the CLUTRR entity form the host composes text-only at 0.76 - capability exists in-family - yet appending the engine's correct, licensed hop-1 fact as one text sentence drops it to 0.43 (delta -0.33) [MEASURED-exploratory: poc/nsk1/out/g2d/g2d_summary.json sha256 93a6e951f6f8c9bcf648f704686c289241a5ac3238955df9d9846336b10b12d0]. The row-level recount (below) shows the damage at capable hosts is PURE ANSWER SUBSTITUTION (bridge capture), not format collapse, and that text delivery rescued ZERO text-only failures at either capable cell (0/24 at 1.7B zero-shot; 0/23 at 360M few-shot). Text-delivery of grounding is therefore not a capacity-limited mechanism that scale fixes - it is a defective channel at every scale tested: where the host is incapable it disrupts, where the host is capable it substitutes, and nowhere does it rescue. Exactly one of nine cells passes the two-clause gate (CLUTRR entity, 135M, few-shot, 0.09 -> 0.17), and it is single-rung, guess-floor-adjacent, and bridge-capture-driven - NOT a clean re-freeze trigger under the section 5.2.1 both-rungs rule as written. The fork consequence: no text-comparator cell re-freezes; the flagship's internal channel (residual-stream delivery) is now the only untested cell and 1.7B is its most informative host, because there the internal arm faces the cleanest possible question - can it rescue what text cannot (24% failures) without breaking what text breaks (43% of correct items)? That is B-prime, specced runner-ready in docs/next/nsk1-bprime-stage0-spec.md.

analyst_recount._method: Computed by this role directly from g2d_rows.jsonl (sha256 304a0f49290760d9c85b0bf92a0acd99b950127e214a6dd1c63f7edd47d21f40) joined to the per-item lexicons of data/nsk1-clutrr/headroom.jsonl (sha256 8b8e99e48cce5fd40a8b7e858b4b75730c9a2d66e9237034f0d3b3b4468c4d8d); paired within-item across arms; counts per 100 items. All MEASURED-exploratory, same scope as the header.

r3_1p7b_zeroshot_clutrr_form2.reading: The text channel rescued 0 of 24 failures and broke 33 of 76 correct items (43% breakage). Name production did NOT collapse (any-lexicon-name 100/100 in BOTH arms - unlike 135M/360M zero-shot where it fell 72->17 and 91->49): the 1.7B pathology is pure bridge capture, top-name mentions 76->43 while bridge mentions 19->56. The capable host reads the fed hop-1 fact and SUBSTITUTES it for the composed answer.

r2_360m_fewshot_clutrr_form2.reading: Same shape as 1.7B: 0 rescues, 14 broken, bridge mentions 17->31, top 77->63. Note few-shot CURED the zero-shot format collapse at 360M (any-name 99/100; text-only 0.77 vs 0.37 zero-shot) - pathology 1 of the exhaustion doc section 2a is a zero-shot prompt artifact at 360M - but bridge capture persists.

r1_135m_fewshot_clutrr_form2_the_passing.discordant_test: 12 wrong->correct vs 4 correct->wrong; one-sided exact binomial p = 0.038 (descriptive only - no test was pre-registered for gate cells)
r1_135m_fewshot_clutrr_form2_the_passing.reading: The +0.08 is nominally non-chance but rides a degraded regime: text-only produces any lexicon name in only 39/100 generations (format collapse persists at 135M even few-shot), and the external arm's behaviour is bridge-capture-dominated (bridge mentions 60 vs top 25). Both accuracies (0.09, 0.17) sit far below the ~0.5 indiscriminate-name floor of the exhaustion doc section 2b, so clause (i) is again satisfied by chance-adjacent name emission, not composition skill.

what_g2d_establishes: DELIVERY-CHANNEL FINDING (the load-bearing one): text-delivery harm is not a host-capacity artifact. It reproduces at a host that demonstrably composes the task (1.7B: 0.76 text-only) and at a prompting regime that restores composition to a tiny host (360M few-shot: 0.77), with an identical row-level signature at both - zero rescued failures, correct items flipped to the parroted bridge. Combined with the zero-shot ladder (135M/360M: -0.22/-0.31 plus format collapse), text delivery of the engine's grounding is now measured harmful across 3 hosts x 2 prompting regimes x 2 eval surfaces, with the harm MECHANISM measured (substitution at capable hosts, disruption + substitution at incapable ones) [MEASURED-exploratory: g2d summary + rows sha256s above; g2/g2b/g2c per the exhaustion doc].

CAPABILITY EXISTS IN-FAMILY: the exhaustion doc's proposed-ASM-C (composition emerges above 360M) is now measured at the entity form - 1.7B zero-shot 0.76 - and, unexpectedly, capability is also UNLOCKABLE AT 360M by two-shot prompting (0.77). The binding constraint at 360M was the zero-shot prompt regime, not parameters; at 135M it is the host (few-shot text-only still 0.09). Scope: CLUTRR entity form only - the relation-word form 1b stays at 0.00 even at 1.7B, and the custom surface stays near-floor at every host (0.10 at 1.7B) [MEASURED-exploratory: same refs].

THE SECOND GATE CLAUSE IS UNPASSABLE-BY-CONSTRUCTION AT CAPABLE HOSTS on this channel: clause (ii) demands external >= text-only + 2pp, but with 0 rescues the external arm can only lose items; the gate can therefore only pass where text-only is low enough that bridge-capture noise nets positive (exactly the 135M few-shot cell). This is an instrument insight, not a paradox: the gate did its job of exposing the comparator's true behaviour before any Tier-2 spend.

RUNNER FEW-SHOT CONSTRUCTION CONFIRMED: k=2, deterministic, exemplars disjoint from every scored item, class-balanced, arm-matched (external exemplars demonstrate COMPOSED gold, not parroted bridge), chat-templated identically, target prompts byte-reused - a faithful operational instantiation of the section 6 A'' mechanism; the disclosed zero-shot -> few-shot construct change stands and must travel with any citation of the few-shot cells [confirmation of a runner-flagged choice; harness sha256 f7a7677d42b2efddbf894a82a5608308838a98a430871c380bd46e76b1ef0e7a].
what_g2d_does_not_establish: NOT a verdict, and NOT citable in one: every G2d row is phase:exploratory pre-freeze gate data. The programme's verdict-grade bottom line is UNCHANGED: zero audited end-task wins over the kernel-as-text null, and no nsk1 verdict object exists.

NOT 'text grounding never helps': scope is 2-hop kinship composition, one feedback sentence, one placement, greedy, max_new_tokens=16, n=100/cell, the SmolLM2-Instruct family. Other content types, placements, formats, decoding regimes, and families are unmeasured. Three hosts in one family license a within-family sign of the harm's persistence, not a slope and not a universal.
NOT a 1.7B re-freeze: 1.7B zero-shot fails clause (ii) maximally; the section 5.2.1 rule as written finds no freezable form at any host on the text-comparator design.

NOT a 135M few-shot re-freeze: the single passing cell fails the both-rungs requirement (360M few-shot entity: delta -0.14, clause ii FAIL), sits below the form-2 guess floor in both arms, and its +0.08 is bridge-capture-flavoured (recount). Freezing a USD 30-70 campaign on it would hang the flagship on a single-rung, floor-adjacent, mechanism-suspect cell - rejected.
NOT evidence about the internal channel: the flagship's actual mechanism (residual-stream delivery) remains the EMPTY CELL. G2d sharpens where and how to test it; it does not test it.

Custom-surface and form-1b readings stay dead-at-floor at 1.7B (0.10/0.03 and 0.00/0.00): the capability statement is form- and surface-specific, and the relation-word output space remains unusable for the campaign at every tested host.
interpretation.refreeze_adjudication: NO CLEAN RE-FREEZE TRIGGER. Applying section 5.2.1 as literally written: freeze candidate = first form passing both clauses at both rungs - no form does (1b passes nowhere; entity form passes only at R1 few-shot; custom passes nowhere). The one candidate relaxation (accept a single-rung few-shot freeze at 135M) is rejected for the three reasons above. The pre-declared exhaustion path therefore continues to govern: ladder exhausted, no freeze, host-scale-vs-task-family remains the registered maintainer fork - now updated by G2d to 'fork ranks 1+2 spent and decisive-negative for the text-comparator design; rank 3 (B-prime) fires next per the maintainer's chosen G2d -> B-prime sequence, with its host amended from R1/R2 to R3 on the G2d capability evidence (ASM-0040)'.

per_thesis_implications.correctness_thesis: Strengthens the exhaustion doc section 4a narrowing with a mechanism and a scale extension: the viable delivery region for checked kernel content excludes the append-as-text channel not just at tiny hosts (disruption) but at capable hosts (substitution). Topologies where the ENGINE consumes kernel content (select/verify/retry, f2b-shaped) remain the only measured-positive delivery class; the internal residual-stream class remains unmeasured.
per_thesis_implications.efficiency_thesis: Two-sided update. Against: the smallest-host text-delivery route stays dead (the one passing cell is floor-adjacent and single-rung). For: few-shot unlocking 360M to 0.77 text-only (matching 1.7B's 0.76) is the cheapest capability lever measured anywhere in this line - if any delivery mechanism ever works, a 360M-few-shot host is a ~5x-smaller candidate site with measured composition. That is a fork input, not a claim.
per_thesis_implications.cross_experiment: The delivery-mechanism split of exhaustion doc section 4c gains a third column entry: engine-external verification (f2b: positive, confounded, audited) | text-content delivery (g2 ladder + G2d: negative with measured mechanism, exploratory, now 3 hosts) | internal state-space delivery (EMPTY - B-prime is its first probe).

ledger_updates.statement: Text-delivery of engine grounding measured harmful at a fully capable host: 1.7B zero-shot CLUTRR entity 0.76 -> 0.43 (delta -0.33), with 0/24 failures rescued and 33/76 correct items flipped to the parroted bridge. Same signature at 360M few-shot (0.77 -> 0.63, 0/23 rescued). Delivery-channel defect, not capacity ceiling.

tree_impact: nsk1 stays DRAFT/unfrozen; the G2 gate ladder (g2, g2b, g2c, g2d) is CLOSED with a decisive diagnosis and no freezable text-comparator cell. The flagship line's critical path is now exactly one object: B-prime (docs/next/nsk1-bprime-stage0-spec.md) - a PASS re-opens nsk1 at R3 with the internal mechanism and a redesigned comparator reading; a KILL retires the training-free internal-write family at the most favourable measured host with a measured reason; either outcome moves the programme. No verdict object exists anywhere in this line and nothing here may be cited as one.
